mapper.select: SELECT id, year, month, emp_id, emp_name, emp_dept, dorm_name, room_name, area, days, total_days, unit_price, amount, status FROM fee_record WHERE year = #{year} AND month = #{month} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY emp_id ASC

SELECT id, year, month, emp_id, emp_name, emp_dept, dorm_name, room_name, area, days, total_days, unit_price, amount, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM fee_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO fee_record ( year, month, emp_id, emp_name, emp_dept, dorm_name, room_name, area, days, total_days, unit_price, amount, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.year}, #{item.month}, #{item.empId}, #{item.empName}, #{item.empDept}, #{item.dormName}, #{item.roomName}, #{item.area}, #{item.days}, #{item.totalDays}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.amount}, 'pending', 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM fee_record WHERE year = #{year} AND month = #{month}
mapper.update: UPDATE fee_record SET status = 'confirmed', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
